import click
import rich
from rich.console import Console
from rich.table import Table


def format_output(data):
    console = Console()
    table = Table(title="Results")
    for row in data:
        table.add_row(*[str(v) for v in row])
    console.print(table)


def parse_config(path):
    with open(path) as f:
        return click.File("r")


def main():
    data = [{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}, {"name": "Bob", "age": 25}]
    format_output(data)
